title: parashorea globosa
intro: Parashorea globosa, also known as the globe tree or kamia wood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parashorea globosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Parashorea globosa include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, with the bark and leaves being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
